title: GoHighLevel Makes Its Entire AI Stack Free for 90 Days: A Summer of AI Playbook for Agencies
desc: GoHighLevel's Summer of AI makes five AI tools free through August 31 plus 30 days free on its AI agents. Here is how agencies should use the 90-day window.
keywords: gohighlevel summer of ai, gohighlevel ai free, gohighlevel conversation ai, gohighlevel ai employees, gohighlevel agency, ai automation agency
cta: Want your GoHighLevel AI set up to actually book leads?
body:
June 11, 2026. GoHighLevel has made almost its entire AI stack free for the summer, and for agencies and local service businesses that is a bigger deal than it sounds. Through its Summer of AI campaign, every HighLevel sub-account gets five AI tools free for 90 days, from June 1 to August 31, plus 30 days free on the platform's paid conversational agents. It is a rare window to put revenue-generating AI into production at zero software cost, and the agencies that treat it as a structured trial rather than a free-for-all will come out of August with systems that pay for themselves.

What GoHighLevel put on the table

  1. Five AI tools free for 90 days. Ask AI, AI Studio, Workflow AI, Funnel AI, and Email AI are free for every sub-account from June 1 through August 31. They cover in-platform guidance, websites and funnels, workflows, and email.
  2. Thirty days free on the paid agents. Any account that has not yet switched them on can run Conversation AI, Voice AI, and every AI Agent free for 30 days. These are the tools that actually answer leads and book appointments.
  3. A full AI employee lineup. HighLevel now ships five role-based agents: an AI Receptionist that answers calls around the clock, an AI Scheduler that fills the calendar, an AI Marketer that runs follow-up campaigns, an AI Reputation Agent that replies to reviews, and an AI Sales Agent that turns leads from any channel into booked appointments.
  4. Agent Studio for custom builds. A drag-and-drop builder lets you assemble multi-step AI automations with no code, so an agency can ship a tailored agent for a client in an afternoon instead of a sprint.
  5. A 100,000 dollar contest. The Summer of AI Road to 100,000 automatically enters any account that activates and uses the free AI, which gives client-facing teams a reason to actually switch the tools on rather than let the trial lapse.
  6. Still shipping weekly. On June 10 HighLevel added call transfer to any device a teammate uses, across web app, phone, and SIP desk phone, plus calendar improvements for rental bookings. The platform is not coasting on the promotion, it is still pushing product.

The June spotlight is speed to lead

HighLevel is framing the summer around Conversation AI, and the pitch rests on one number every operator should tape to their monitor. The effective shot clock on a new lead is about five minutes, yet the average human takes three hours and twenty minutes to reply. Conversation AI closes that gap by answering across SMS, Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp, and live chat the moment a lead arrives, qualifying it and booking the appointment before a competitor picks up the phone. For most local businesses, fixing speed to lead is the single highest-return automation available, and for the next 90 days the software to do it costs nothing.

What it means for operators

A free tool that is badly configured is not free. An AI receptionist that quotes the wrong price, an AI scheduler that double-books, or a Conversation AI that answers a buying question with a generic script will cost you the lead and some trust on the way out. The value of this window is not the license fee you are saving, it is the chance to test AI on real traffic and learn what good configuration looks like before you are paying for it. That means feeding each agent your real FAQs, prices, and calendar rules, setting clear escalation paths to a human, and reading the transcripts for the first two weeks the way you would coach a new hire.

This is exactly the work we do for clients. Our GoHighLevel services cover the setup most teams skip: connecting Conversation AI and the AI employees to your real data, writing the prompts and guardrails, and routing edge cases to a person. If you want a custom agent built in Agent Studio or wired into the rest of your stack, you can hire a GoHighLevel developer from us, and our broader AI automation agency can connect HighLevel to the tools outside it so a booked appointment also updates your CRM, billing, and reporting.

A 90-day playbook

Treat the summer as a sequence, not a buffet. Start with one workflow that maps directly to revenue, almost always speed to lead, and turn on Conversation AI for a single business or client. Load it with the real answers to the ten questions prospects actually ask, connect your live calendar, and set the rule for when it hands off to a human. Measure one number, booked appointments, for two weeks. Once that loop is reliable, layer in the AI Receptionist for missed calls and the AI Reputation Agent for reviews, both of which compound the same lead flow. Save Agent Studio and any custom multi-step build for last, when you understand how your prospects behave and can design an agent around it. Done in that order, you reach August with two or three automations that already produce booked revenue, which makes the decision to keep paying for them obvious.

Mind the meter after summer

The offer is genuinely useful, but plan for the cliff. The five core tools are free through August 31 and the paid agents are free for 30 days, after which normal usage billing resumes, and Voice AI with external voice models is billed per minute on top of your plan. Decide before the window closes which automations have earned a permanent place in your stack and which were experiments. Walking into the fall with a clear-eyed view of what each agent books versus what it costs is how you turn a summer promotion into a system you actually keep. For a deeper build that ties HighLevel into the rest of your operation, our AI automation team can help you make that call with the numbers in front of you.

The bigger shift for agencies

Step back and the promotion is a signal. HighLevel is betting that the agencies and businesses that standardize on its AI now will not leave, and it is probably right. Once Conversation AI is answering your leads, the AI Receptionist is covering your phones, and a custom agent is running a core workflow, the platform stops being a tool you rent and becomes the operating system your business runs on. That is good news if you own the configuration and a problem if you do not, because the lock-in cuts both ways. The agencies that win the next year are the ones that go deep now, learn how to make these agents reliable on real customer conversations, and package that expertise for clients who do not have the time to learn it during a 90-day window. The software is free for the summer. The skill of making it work is the part that stays valuable.
faqs: What is GoHighLevel's Summer of AI?

It is a promotion running June 1 to August 31, 2026 that makes five AI tools, Ask AI, AI Studio, Workflow AI, Funnel AI, and Email AI, free for every sub-account, and gives accounts that have not activated them 30 days free on Conversation AI, Voice AI, and all AI Agents.
Which GoHighLevel AI tools are free, and for how long?

The five core tools are free for the full 90 days through August 31. Conversation AI, Voice AI, and the AI Agents are free for 30 days for accounts that have not switched them on. After those windows, normal usage billing resumes, and Voice AI with external voice models is billed per minute.
What is Conversation AI and why is GoHighLevel spotlighting it?

Conversation AI answers and qualifies leads automatically across SMS, social, WhatsApp, and live chat, and books appointments around the clock. HighLevel is spotlighting it because speed to lead is the highest-return automation for most local businesses: the shot clock on a new lead is about five minutes, but the average human reply takes over three hours.
What are the GoHighLevel AI employees?

Five role-based agents: AI Receptionist that answers calls, AI Scheduler that books appointments, AI Marketer that runs campaigns, AI Reputation Agent that replies to reviews, and AI Sales Agent that converts leads from any channel.
Should my business or agency adopt these tools during the free window?

The window is a low-risk way to test AI on real traffic, but a poorly configured agent can cost you leads. The return comes from feeding each agent your real data, writing clear prompts and escalation rules, and measuring booked appointments. That setup is where an experienced partner adds the most value.
How can imisofts help with GoHighLevel AI?

We configure Conversation AI and the AI employees against your real data, write the prompts and guardrails, build custom agents in Agent Studio, and connect HighLevel to the rest of your stack so a booking also updates your CRM, billing, and reporting. You can start with our GoHighLevel services or hire a GoHighLevel developer.
